title: Section 139
content: 1 [139. Negligently breaking or damaging works.--Whoever, negligently breaks, injures, throws down or damages any material connected with the supply of electricity, shall be punishable with fine which may extend to ten thousand rupees.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 57 of 2003, s. 6, for sections 139 and 140 (w.e.f. 27-4-2004).
